title: pathach #6605
definition:
1) to open
    1a) (Qal) to open
    1b) (Niphal) to be opened, be let loose, be thrown open
    1c) (Piel)
        1c1) to free
        1c2) to loosen
        1c3) to open, open oneself
    1d) (Hithpael) to loose oneself
 2) to carve, engrave
    2a) (Piel) to engrave
    2b) (Pual) to be engraved
